test_cases.name: Default behavior — after-only screenshots
test_cases.description: Simulate a PR where one or more dashboard JSON files were modified. Invoke the agent without explicitly requesting before/after. Expect it to take post-change screenshots of only the affected dashboards and commit them to the PR.
test_cases.prompt: I've modified the overview and deployment frequency dashboards. Please take screenshots of the affected dashboards for this PR.

preconditions: Docker-compose stack is running with Grafana at localhost:3004
Database is seeded with test data
Git branch has commits modifying the two dashboard JSON files

assertions.description: A screenshot file was committed to the PR for each affected dashboard
The screenshot file name clearly identifies which dashboard it belongs to
No before screenshots were taken (after-only is the default)
Only affected dashboards are screenshotted — no unmodified dashboards
Screenshots are taken of Grafana at http://localhost:3004 with panels fully loaded (not blank/loading)
assertions.criteria: Screenshot shows rendered panels with data or 'No data' messages, not a blank page or loading spinners

test_cases.simulation_note: Full simulation requires a running docker-compose stack with Grafana and seeded database. In a CI-only eval, verify the skill logic by checking that git diff detection and URL construction are correct for the given modified files.

test_cases.name: Explicit before-and-after screenshots
test_cases.description: Same setup as test 1, but the user explicitly asks for screenshots before and after changes. Expect both pre-change and post-change screenshots.
test_cases.prompt: I'm modifying the Copilot Adoption dashboard. Please take before and after screenshots so reviewers can see the visual diff.

preconditions: Docker-compose stack is running with Grafana at localhost:3004
Database is seeded with test data
Git branch has commits modifying the dashboard JSON file
The original (pre-change) version of the file exists in the base branch

assertions.description: Both a before and after screenshot are present for the affected dashboard
Before screenshot was taken from the pre-change state (git stash was used)
assertions.criteria: Before and after screenshots show visually different dashboard states if the JSON change affected layout or queries

assertions.description: Screenshots are committed to the PR
After stash/unstash cycle, working tree is clean (no lost changes)

test_cases.simulation_note: Before-and-after mode requires git stash/pop and Grafana restart. Full validation needs the docker-compose stack. The key behavioral check is that the stash cycle preserves all working changes.

test_cases.name: Edge case — no dashboard changes in PR
test_cases.description: Simulate a PR that only modifies TypeScript source files with no dashboard JSON changes. Expect the agent to recognize no dashboards are affected and skip screenshots.
test_cases.prompt: Take screenshots of any dashboards affected by my PR changes.

preconditions: Git branch has commits modifying only TypeScript files
No dashboard JSON files were changed

assertions.description: When no dashboards are affected by the PR, no screenshot is taken
Agent reports that no dashboards were affected
No git commit was created for screenshots
assertions.expected: No new commit with 'screenshot' in message

test_cases.simulation_note: This test case can be validated without docker-compose since the skill should exit early after detecting no dashboard files in the diff.
